title: Refactor: Implement factory pattern for object creation
original_text: Refactored object creation to use factory pattern. Created factories for complex object creation. Implemented abstract factory for families of related objects. Added factory methods for configurable object instantiation. This centralizes creation logic and reduces coupling. Added tests for factory classes. Result: 39 tests pass.
expected_subject: refactor(pattern): implement factory pattern for object creation
expected_body_lines: - Create factories for complex object creation
- Implement abstract factory for related object families
- Add factory methods for configurable instantiation
- Centralize creation logic and reduce coupling
expected_command: git commit -m "refactor(pattern): implement factory pattern for object creation"
